title: Korea Plans Measures on Leveraged ETFs Driving Wild Volatility
extracted_text:
[feed summary]
South Korea will soon announce measures regarding the leveraged exchange-traded funds tied to shares of Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. that have fueled a surge in market volatility.
notes: T3, not T2. 'Korea Plans Measures' = proposed regulation not yet enacted. T2 for trade/regulatory actions requires the measure to be officially signed and in force. Proposals and announced plans are explicitly T3.
